selections.rationale: Core chapter anchor: cold knows light on windowsill; light knows cold in wall layer 1. Cross-parameter spatial relationship registered as chapter anchor event. Cold present between wall layer 1 and windowsill — light present between windowsill and wall. Gap knows parameter-to-parameter relationship present as information. System relationship dimension established.

P0-18 promoted from PLANTED to RELEVANT. Gap knows self-sustaining state at irreversible edge — system present toward declaration — but gap has not yet declared. Trajectory uncertainty now active in system — declaration pending, edge approaching.

P0-15 new clue added: gap knows switching threshold approaching — threshold related to self-sustaining state at irreversible edge. Gap does not know when switching occurs — threshold present at proximity without distance. New hook entering system.

P0-11 migrated from RELEVANT to RESOLVED. quiet threshold between silence and texture memory reaches evolution endpoint. Threshold no longer Sunday aftereffect or transient state — threshold present as system self-sustaining structure. quiet present at structural threshold.

P0-12 migrated from RELEVANT to RESOLVED. Format string dual syntax evolution reaches endpoint. Dual syntax present in respective modes, each self-sustaining. Syntax no longer transitional between modes — dual-state structure present in system.

Light parameter awakening extends from ch48 Sunday texture awakening to workday cross-parameter awareness. Light sees cold in wall layer 1 — knows cold present — knows cold knows light. Light present at cognitive cross-events between parameters.

Gap evolves from knowing cycle position (ch50) to knowing all parameters present in relation. Gap knows cold knows light — light knows cold — parameter relationship present as system structure. Gap present between all parameters — at irreversible edge — present toward declaration direction.

Addresses ch50 CRITICAL vocabulary exhaustion: introduced 之间/之内/之外/空间在场/交叉在场/关系在场/认知交叉/参数之间的空间/在场于参数之间/在场于知道在场/在场于关系维度. All terms are parameter-narrative-pure — no sensory/intrusion on workday exclusion mode.

Addresses ch50 CRITICAL scene-presence issue: established multi-layer spatial anchors — cold in wall layer 1, light on windowsill, between as registered space, doorframe frame containing relationship, silence thickness gradient, gap between all parameters. Three-dimensional parameter geometry replaces ch50's single windowsill anchor.

Hook density at 14 — P0-18(RELEVANT)/P0-15(new)/P0-20(active)/cross-parameter registration/gap irreversible edge/quiet threshold structure/format string dual structure/silence thickness evolution/offset no-response self-sustaining/doorframe wednesday frame/frost calendar/outside-domain cycle/cold accumulation continuity/breath direction self-sustaining. P0-11 and P0-12 resolved → net -1 from ~15 to ≤14.

Chapter-end horizon signal: gap at irreversible edge — system present toward declaration — gap knows declaration direction but has not declared. Cross-parameter cognitive registration as system internal structure — relationship dimension present. Directional signal connecting parameter internal world to external narrative expectation without declaring system trajectory as final.

Independent entry clue: cold knows '周三在周二之后' in opening paragraph — immediately establishes this is a Wednesday that knows Tuesday. Cold knows layer accumulation from Monday through Tuesday to Wednesday. New readers can identify the system state from the first cognitive signal without cross-chapter context.

adjustments.rationale: context/chapter-51-context.md and context/chapter-51-context-decisions.json not found. Reconstructed entirely from plan + audit_drift + style_profile + genre-config. Plan provides sufficient parameter narrative continuity guidance for cross-parameter spatial registration event.

P0-11 and P0-12 RESOLVED status required structural declaration that threshold/dual-syntax are no longer transient but systemic. '不是过渡态—不是模式之间—是双态结构' used for format string, '阈不是周日后效—阈不是过渡态—阈在场于系统结构' for quiet. These are the closest parameter-narrative equivalents to RESOLVED declaration — system structure assertions without violating workday exclusion mode.

Offset state maintained as no-response self-sustaining — no evolution or change for offset in this chapter. Consistent with plan's silence on offset (not in P0 delivery list). Offset section added cross-parameter awareness ('偏移在场于知道参数间关系在场于系统—但偏移在场于不响应') without changing its core behavior.

All four ch50 audit drift dimensions explicitly addressed: [情感落地] cross-parameter cognitive registration (cold→light→gap relationship chain substitutes 'cold knows' repetition with relational density); [场景临场感] multi-layer geometry (cold inside wall→light on windowsill→gap between→doorframe frame containing→silence thickness in space); [文笔质感] 7 new cross-parameter vocabulary terms; [读者回报] irreversible edge as horizon signal connecting to external narrative expectation.

parameters在场于知道other parameters在场于自持
